email_body:
Beste mevrouw/meneer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de stage Digital Marketing bij Cadence. Uw oproep voor een proactieve, nieuwsgierige stagiair sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik werk dagelijks met tools zoals Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs, en ik ben gewend om campagnes te testen en prestaties te analyseren.

Hoewel mijn ervaring met Marketo nog beperkt is, leer ik snel nieuwe tools en platformen. Mijn technische achtergrond en affiniteit met data-gedreven marketing maken mij een sterke kandidaat om bij te dragen aan uw demand generation campagnes.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en heb B1 Nederlands. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben beschikbaar voor een stage van 6 maanden.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek verder te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam/Sir,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Marketing Internship at Cadence. Your call for a proactive, curious intern aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I work daily with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs, and I am used to testing campaigns and analyzing performance.

Although my experience with Marketo is still limited, I learn new tools and platforms quickly. My technical background and affinity with data-driven marketing make me a strong candidate to contribute to your demand generation campaigns.

I speak fluent English and have B1 Dutch. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am available for a 6-month internship.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I hope to convince you further in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw/meneer,

Toen ik de vacature voor Digital Marketing stagiair bij Cadence las, voelde ik meteen dat dit de kans is waar ik naar op zoek ben. Uw focus op demand generation, marketing automation en datagedreven beslissingen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en leergierigheid.

Als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk dagelijks met tools zoals Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs om campagnes te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en GEO-technieken geïmplementeerd om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd hoe belangrijk het is om campagnes te testen, data te analyseren en continu te optimaliseren.

Hoewel ik nog geen directe ervaring heb met Marketo, ben ik ervan overtuigd dat ik dit snel onder de knie krijg. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (AngularJS, JavaScript) en mijn affiniteit met data maken mij een snelle leerling in nieuwe tools. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, maar ook om samen te werken met teams – zoals ik bij Episto doe met collega’s en klanten.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Cadence is de kans om te leren hoe demand generation werkt binnen een toonaangevend techbedrijf. Ik wil graag mijn vaardigheden inzetten om bij te dragen aan echte campagnes en tegelijkertijd mijn kennis van marketing automation en CRM verdiepen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en heb B1 Nederlands. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben fulltime beschikbaar voor een stage van 6 maanden.

Ik hoop u in een gesprek te mogen overtuigen van mijn motivatie en potentieel.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam/Sir,

When I read the vacancy for Digital Marketing Intern at Cadence, I immediately felt this is the opportunity I have been looking for. Your focus on demand generation, marketing automation, and data-driven decisions aligns perfectly with my experience and eagerness to learn.

As a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work daily with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to optimize campaigns. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This experience has taught me the importance of testing campaigns, analyzing data, and continuously optimizing.

Although I do not yet have direct experience with Marketo, I am confident I will master it quickly. My technical background in web development (AngularJS, JavaScript) and my affinity with data make me a fast learner of new tools. I am used to working independently, but also to collaborating with teams – as I do at Episto with colleagues and clients.

What appeals to me at Cadence is the chance to learn how demand generation works within a leading tech company. I want to apply my skills to contribute to real campaigns while deepening my knowledge of marketing automation and CRM.

I speak fluent English and have B1 Dutch. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am available full-time for a 6-month internship.

I hope to convince you of my motivation and potential in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on digital marketing experience: on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and campaign performance tracking using Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs
- Technical web skills: WordPress site building (Elementor, Astra), structured data (JSON-LD schema), and GEO/AEO techniques for AI search visibility
- Data-driven and analytical: comfortable with spreadsheets, testing campaigns, and using analytics to guide decisions
- Fast learner with a technical foundation (front-end development, AngularJS, JavaScript) and affinity for B2B tech
- Fluent English and B1 Dutch; based in Zwijndrecht near Antwerp, available for 6-month internship
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in demand generation activities including on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content creation, and campaign performance analysis. At Episto, I run full-cycle WordPress site builds and maintenance, write SEO blog content, and track performance using analytics tools. On my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with marketing operations, list segmentation, and campaign testing; quick to pick up new tools like Marketo. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Digital marketing & demand generation: campaign support, email marketing, landing pages, audience segmentation, lead management, campaign testing, performance reporting
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Marketing tools & analytics: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, spreadsheets
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
